title: Nizam Frontmatter Schema
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block required at the top of every governance Markdown file shipped by the Nizam framework (standard/, methodology/, templates/, tools/, and their module README files). Declares the 6 required keys named in product_spec.md Sec 6.1. Additional keys beyond the 6 required ones are permitted so individual modules may extend frontmatter with module-specific metadata (for example the 'change_log' array observed on planning documents).

id.description: A unique, kebab-case identifier for the document.

title.description: The human-readable title of the document.

description.description: A concise summary of the document's purpose.

version.description: The semantic version of the document (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH).

status.description: The current lifecycle state of the document.

authoritative_source.description: The repository-relative path to the artifact this document describes, or 'NA' for documents with no single source artifact.

change_log.description: Optional change history entries for documents that track their own revision log.
